mapper.select: SELECT submission_judge_result AS slug, COUNT(*) AS submissions FROM `voj_submissions` WHERE submission_submit_time >= #{startTime} AND submission_submit_time < #{endTime} GROUP BY submission_judge_result
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM voj_submissions WHERE submission_judge_result = 'PD'

SELECT submission_id, s1.problem_id, submission_judge_result FROM voj_submissions s1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT MAX(submission_id) AS max_submission_id, problem_id FROM voj_submissions WHERE uid = #{uid} AND problem_id >= #{problemIdLowerBound} AND problem_id <= #{problemIdUpperBound} GROUP BY problem_id ) s2 ON s1.problem_id = s2.problem_id AND s1.submission_id = s2.max_submission_id

SELECT MAX(submission_id) AS submission_id, problem_id, MAX(submission_judge_result) AS submission_judge_result FROM voj_submissions WHERE uid = #{uid} AND problem_id >= #{problemIdLowerBound} AND problem_id <= #{problemIdUpperBound} AND submission_judge_result = 'AC' GROUP BY problem_id
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT problem_id) FROM voj_submissions WHERE uid = #{uid} AND submission_judge_result = 'AC'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM voj_submissions WHERE uid = #{uid} AND submission_judge_result != 'PD' AND submission_judge_result != 'SE'

SELECT d.problem_difficulty_slug AS slug, d.problem_difficulty_name AS name, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.problem_status = 'PUBLISHED' THEN p.problem_id END) AS total, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.problem_status = 'PUBLISHED' AND s.submission_judge_result = 'AC' THEN s.problem_id END) AS solved FROM voj_problem_difficulty d LEFT JOIN voj_problems p ON p.problem_difficulty_id = d.problem_difficulty_id LEFT JOIN voj_submissions s ON s.problem_id = p.problem_id AND s.uid = #{uid} GROUP BY d.problem_difficulty_id, d.problem_difficulty_slug, d.problem_difficulty_name ORDER BY d.problem_difficulty_id
SELECT uid AS uid, COUNT(DISTINCT problem_id) AS solved FROM voj_submissions WHERE submission_judge_result = 'AC' GROUP BY uid ORDER BY solved DESC, uid ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO voj_submissions(problem_id, uid, language_id, submission_code) VALUES (#{problem.problemId}, #{user.uid}, #{language.languageId}, #{code})
mapper.update: UPDATE voj_submissions SET submission_judge_result = #{judgeResultSlug}, submission_judge_log = #{judgeLog}, submission_execute_time = NOW() WHERE submission_id = #{submissionId} AND submission_judge_result = 'PD'
